actions.command: Review templates/action queues and mark exact rows manual_confirmed=true before importing.
actions.blocker: No public workflow has manual_confirmed=true rows yet.

actions.command: Work batches by topic, missing field, and source store; prepare reviewed patches only.
actions.blocker: Exact source evidence is required before catalog mutation.

actions.command: Work the non-barcode requested-focus action queue before long barcode research.
actions.blocker: Exact source evidence is still required before catalog mutation.

actions.command: Review Danganronpa rows missing both source and image evidence; fill exact official or licensed source URLs before attaching images.
actions.blocker: Exact official or licensed source evidence is required before catalog mutation.

actions.command: Open the focus template work_order and confirm exact product source URLs for the next store/category pack.
actions.blocker: Imports stay dry-run only until exact product URLs are manually confirmed.

actions.command: Find exact official/detail source URLs for rows missing source_url.
actions.blocker: Rows without exact source_url cannot safely import images.

actions.command: Confirm exact product/detail URLs from official search paths before broad source research.
actions.blocker: Auto source import is disabled; every source_url needs exact product evidence.

actions.command: Review exact-looking product/detail candidates that already include source and image URLs.
actions.blocker: Candidate source/image pairs can still be wrong variants; manual identity review is required.

actions.command: Review broad Ensky cache matches, then fill exact source_url and image_url templates only for confirmed products.
actions.blocker: Broad cache candidates can match the wrong character or goods type, so auto-apply stays disabled.

actions.command: Extract images only after exact source_url evidence is confirmed.
actions.blocker: No exact source_url-ready image rows are currently published.

actions.command: Work image attachment batches with exact product evidence before broad missing-image research.
actions.blocker: Auto image import is disabled; every image URL needs reviewed product evidence.

actions.command: Fill titles, barcodes, dates, prices, sources, and images from reviewed evidence.
actions.blocker: Broad metadata updates require field-specific evidence policies.

actions.command: Confirm release dates, prices, and Japanese names from official evidence before barcode work.
actions.blocker: Auto metadata import is disabled; every field/store group needs evidence.

actions.command: Review Ichiban Kuji campaign title, prize rank, prize item name, variant detail, and image identity against official lineup pages.
actions.blocker: Official lineup evidence is required before mutating prize display names or replacing images.

actions.command: Review duplicate groups and record explicit keep/drop decisions before deletion.
actions.blocker: auto_delete_enabled is false; variant risk requires manual decisions.

actions.command: Review high/medium-confidence duplicate groups before variant-risk dedupe work.
actions.blocker: Auto-merge and auto-delete remain disabled; every group needs explicit confirmation.

actions.command: Verify same-name Ichiban Kuji rows against campaign pages before any dedupe decision.
actions.blocker: Same display names can be re-releases or campaign-specific prizes; do not merge until official campaign evidence is checked.

actions.command: Verify official 1kuji campaign pages before applying release dates or prices.
actions.blocker: Old campaign date/price gaps remain blocked without labeled official evidence.

actions.command: Confirm labeled official 1kuji release dates and prices, then fill campaign patch templates.
actions.blocker: Historical 1kuji metadata is manual-only until official campaign evidence is confirmed.

actions.command: Apply confirmed last-one/double-chance zero-price fixes first; then review numbered variant coverage, multi-variant prize labels, and reissue duplicate candidates.
actions.blocker: No zero-price violations remain; numbered variant, variant, and reissue groups still need official campaign review before mutation.

actions.command: Confirm animation category-to-folder mapping templates before catalog mutation.
actions.blocker: Folder/category mappings remain manual-only until sample names confirm product type.

actions.command: Map unknown animation categories to reviewed app folder visual tokens.
actions.blocker: Category changes can affect app navigation and must be reviewed.

instructions: Use actions in priority order to keep DB cleanup work aligned with public reports.
Commands are workflow descriptions, not auto-executed mutations.
Catalog writes remain disabled until exact source evidence or manual_confirmed=true rows exist.
